other_observers: Todd Deininger, John Vanderpoel, Gary Matthews, Rick and Connie Steincamp, Sue Riffe, Barb Hoover, Lou Mazzola, Mark Chavez, Bob Zilly, Tom Lechlightner, Pat Heller, Mike and Mary Blechley; Mark Peterson and Bran Steger
description: medium sized, long legged wading bird with the following noted features:  large white cheek patch on a black face; pale streak on the forehead, crown that was light yellow right above the eyes and then became just off white further back on the crown; red eye; stout black bill; dark blue-gray body and wings; stubby appearance; pale, light yellow legsBehaviors: The bird stood very still on the weedy mud flats of Jumbe Res.Call: N/APlumage: adult
